title: Derivative Product
description: Product additionally processed from baseline or unenhanced mission data.

definitions.definition: Product additionally processed from baseline or unenhanced mission data.
definitions.notes:
- Generally either a compilation of time-series data (e.g., all time, annual, monthly or seasonal summary data, > Level 3) or thematic versions of each individual data tile of baseline data.
- Derived products are citable via a Digital Object Identifier (DOI).
definitions.sources: - [WGISS Shared Collection Lifecycle Management Principles for Earth Observation Data](https://ceos.org/document_management/Working_Groups/WGISS/Documents/Shared%20Collection%20Lifecycle%20Management%20Principles%20for%20Earth%20Observation%20Data_March2025.pdf)
